crime.value: Store robbery/heist by the Moriarty gang
crime.quote: The crew began to collect the riches from the cash register, the safe, and the other somewhat hidden places

culprit_and_motive.value: The Moriarty gang robbing for money, Drake abandoned Addison during the heist
culprit_and_motive.quote: Drake stopped, turned his head slightly, and sighed. 'I'm sorry, Addi.' he said. Then he walked away

resolution.value: Addison lets Drake go but warns him she'll arrest him if caught stealing again
resolution.quote: just this once, I will let you go free. Though, if I ever catch you stealing again, I will turn you in

investigator.value: Addison Carter, former criminal turned junior detective under Detective Connor Doyle
investigator.quote: I became a private investigator. My goal is to help people, instead of hurt them, as I once did.

clue_fairness.value: Detective training includes magnifying glass discovery and problem-solving education visible to reader
clue_fairness.quote: I see you were exploring your room. This is very good, Ms. Carter, very good indeed!

social_world.value: Criminal gang hierarchy with leader Jamieson, loyalty betrayals, and detective mentorship structure
social_world.quote: Drake stopped, turned his head slightly, and sighed. 'I'm sorry, Addi.' he said.

media_and_audience.value: Story framed as case files for public consumption with investigator directly addressing readers
media_and_audience.quote: To everyone reading my case files, this is Addison Carter, Junior Detective, signing off.

investigator_wound.value: Former criminal past and abandonment trauma driving redemptive detective work
investigator_wound.quote: My goal is to help people, instead of hurt them, as I once did.

_meta.title: ebook robi crusoe it all started at four corners
